ops.body: Premise corrected during implementation: multi-language layer co-selection doesn't exist in repo-bootstrap (single-choice --layer), so the 'clobber' was unreachable. Shipped as the --secondary-layer feature instead (user-picked option B): --secondary-layer python --var SECONDARY_CODE_ROOT=<dir> renders the secondary Python STYLEGUIDE.md beside that code + an AGENTS.md '## Python Style' fragment pointer; plus every scaffold now ships .claude/hooks/STYLEGUIDE.md (hook-authoring guide) + '## Hook Style' pointer. cc-skills commits c7e7608a (v0.51.0) + 89646ece (verbatim template, v0.51.1), both CI green, tmp-dir render verified (root Go guide + plugin/hooks/STYLEGUIDE.md + .claude/hooks/STYLEGUIDE.md all present, 0 leftover tokens).
